content.text: Let me check the context around `agent_loop.rs:273` to understand what that site does.

I now have all the information needed. Here are the precise answers:

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs and emits `PolicyDenial` inline inside the agent loop when a requested tool is not in the allowlist (the primary loop-level enforcement point)
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: constructs and emits a synthetic `PolicyDenial` (line 92) when `EnforcedAuditSink` intercepts a `ToolCallRequested` event for a tool not in the allowlist — i.e. a second enforcement layer that catches bypasses

(Line 70 in `tool_enforcement.rs` and line 202 in `v2_runtime_smoke.rs` and line 102 in `tool_allowlist.rs` are all pattern-match sites, not constructors.)

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`

I now have all the information needed. Here are the precise answers:

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs and emits `PolicyDenial` inline inside the agent loop when a requested tool is not in the allowlist (the primary loop-level enforcement point)
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: constructs and emits a synthetic `PolicyDenial` (line 92) when `EnforcedAuditSink` intercepts a `ToolCallRequested` event for a tool not in the allowlist — i.e. a second enforcement layer that catches bypasses

(Line 70 in `tool_enforcement.rs` and line 202 in `v2_runtime_smoke.rs` and line 102 in `tool_allowlist.rs` are all pattern-match sites, not constructors.)

## B. AuditSink implementors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
